docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT VEGARA & DEFENDANT VISHVESH JHAVERI.
